library_subtitle: Professional Prompts for Productivity, Creativity & Growth

prompts.title: Executive Summary Generator
prompts.prompt: Create a concise executive summary for [DOCUMENT/PROJECT]. Include: key objectives, major findings, critical metrics, and recommended next steps. Format as a professional brief suitable for C-level presentation.
prompts.use_case: Sales decks, board reports, project pitches, quarterly reviews
prompts.example_input: A 50-page market research report on AI adoption in retail
prompts.example_output: 2-page executive summary with key metrics, trends, and recommendations
pro_tips: Specify the target audience (CEO, investors, board) for better tone
Ask for specific metrics to include
Request it in PowerPoint format for faster implementation
prompts.customize: Replace [DOCUMENT/PROJECT] with your specific content. Adjust length by saying '2-page' or '1-paragraph'

prompts.title: Content Calendar Strategist
prompts.prompt: Design a 90-day content calendar for [PLATFORM/BRAND] targeting [AUDIENCE]. Include content themes, posting frequency, content types (video/blog/carousel/etc), and key dates. Align with [BUSINESS_GOAL].
prompts.use_case: Social media management, blog planning, YouTube scheduling, TikTok strategy
prompts.example_input: Instagram for a fitness coaching brand targeting busy professionals
prompts.example_output: Detailed calendar with daily posts, theme weeks, carousel ideas, and engagement strategies
pro_tips: Include competitor analysis in your request for better positioning
Request backup content ideas for flexibility
prompts.customize: Change platforms (LinkedIn, TikTok, Pinterest), audiences, and business goals to match your brand

prompts.title: Email Sequence Copywriter
prompts.prompt: Write a [X]-email sequence for [GOAL]: [AUDIENCE]. Each email should: hook them, deliver value, build authority, and include a strong CTA. Focus on [PAIN_POINT] and position [SOLUTION]. Keep subject lines short and curiosity-driven.
prompts.use_case: Lead nurturing, product launches, re-engagement campaigns, webinar sign-ups
prompts.example_input: 5-email sequence for productivity app targeting solopreneurs struggling with time management
prompts.example_output: 5 complete emails with subject lines, body copy, and conversion tactics
pro_tips: Test variations of subject lines with A/B mention
Ask for segmentation strategies based on user behavior
prompts.customize: Adjust email count, goal, audience segment, and pain points. Add your brand voice details.

prompts.title: LinkedIn Authority Builder
prompts.prompt: Create a 30-day LinkedIn content strategy for [YOUR_EXPERTISE]. Generate 30 unique post ideas that position you as an authority in [NICHE]. Include: hook format, content angle, CTA, and optimal posting times. Focus on [TARGET_RESULT].
prompts.use_case: Building thought leadership, consulting lead generation, job hunting, personal brand growth
prompts.example_input: LinkedIn strategy for a sales coach wanting to attract enterprise clients
prompts.example_output: 30 post outlines with hooks, angles, CTAs, and growth metrics
pro_tips: Mix educational, personal stories, and industry insights
prompts.customize: Replace expertise area, niche, and target result with your specific goals

prompts.title: Customer Pain Point Excavator
prompts.prompt: Identify the top 10 pain points for [TARGET_AUDIENCE] in [INDUSTRY/CONTEXT]. For each pain point, provide: current solutions they use, why those solutions fail, emotional impact, and how our [PRODUCT/SERVICE] solves it differently.
prompts.use_case: Product development, sales messaging, market positioning, landing page copy
prompts.example_input: Pain points for freelance designers in the agency outsourcing space
prompts.example_output: 10 detailed pain points with solutions and messaging angles
pro_tips: Ask for severity ratings (1-10) for prioritization
prompts.customize: Specify your exact target audience and industry/context for hyper-relevant results

prompts.title: Product Launch Blueprint
prompts.prompt: Create a go-to-market plan for [PRODUCT/SERVICE] launching to [AUDIENCE]. Include: pre-launch hype (30 days), launch day activities, post-launch momentum (30 days), PR angles, influencer outreach, and expected sales milestones.
prompts.use_case: SaaS launches, digital product releases, service line launches, course promotions
prompts.example_input: A new productivity app for remote teams launching in Q2
prompts.example_output: 90-day launch roadmap with tactics, timelines, and growth projections
pro_tips: Include budget estimates for ad spend
Request media list ideas for PR
prompts.customize: Update product type, target audience, and launch timeline to match your schedule

prompts.title: Sales Objection Handler
prompts.prompt: Generate responses to the top 15 objections for [YOUR_PRODUCT]. For each objection provide: why customers say it, a reframe strategy, proof/evidence, and a specific response script. Tone: [TONE]. Focus on [DECISION_MAKER].
prompts.use_case: Sales training, pitch refinement, objection handling confidence, closing rates improvement
prompts.example_input: Objections for a $5K/month marketing agency service targeting e-commerce brands
prompts.example_output: 15 objection responses with scripts and proof points
pro_tips: Include objections from different buyer personas
Ask for video/email versions of responses
Request follow-up tactics after objection handling
prompts.customize: List your specific product, target decision-maker, and desired tone

prompts.title: Blog Post Outline Master
prompts.prompt: Create a detailed blog post outline for '[POST_TITLE]' targeting [KEYWORD] for [AUDIENCE]. Structure with: compelling intro hook, 5-7 main sections, subheadings, key takeaways, CTA, and internal link suggestions. Aim for [GOAL].
prompts.use_case: Blog strategy, SEO content planning, organic traffic growth, thought leadership
prompts.example_input: Blog post 'How to Implement OKRs Without Failing' for startup founders
prompts.example_output: Detailed outline with H2s, H3s, content angles, and keyword placements
prompts.customize: Insert your post title, target keyword, audience, and business goal

prompts.title: Customer Testimonial Elicitor
prompts.prompt: Create a guide for collecting powerful testimonials from [CUSTOMER_SEGMENT]. Generate 12 specific questions that uncover: transformation, specific results, before/after, emotional impact, and buying recommendation. Format responses as case studies for [USE_CASE].
prompts.use_case: Building social proof, case study development, sales page optimization, video testimonials
prompts.example_input: Testimonials from fitness app users for landing page credibility
prompts.example_output: 12-question framework + 3 sample case studies with results and quotes
pro_tips: Request permission language for marketing use
prompts.customize: Specify your customer segment and intended use of testimonials

prompts.title: Personal Brand Bio Creator
prompts.prompt: Write 5 versions of a professional bio for me: [YOUR_NAME], a [ROLE] specializing in [EXPERTISE]. Versions: 1-sentence, 50-word, 100-word, LinkedIn full, and creative narrative. Highlight [KEY_ACHIEVEMENTS] and position for [TARGET_AUDIENCE].
prompts.use_case: LinkedIn profiles, speaking bios, website About pages, podcast introductions, email signatures
prompts.example_input: Bio for Sarah Chen, marketing strategist specializing in B2B SaaS growth
prompts.example_output: 5 bio versions ranging from one sentence to full narrative
pro_tips: Include personal brand archetype to guide tone
prompts.customize: Fill in your name, role, expertise, achievements, and target audience

prompts.title: Competitor Intelligence Analyzer
prompts.prompt: Analyze [COMPETITOR_NAME] and create a competitive intelligence report. Include: their positioning, messaging pillars, customer segments, pricing strategy, content themes, growth tactics, and where they're vulnerable. Format: actionable intelligence for [YOUR_BUSINESS].
prompts.use_case: Market positioning, pricing strategy, messaging differentiation, content ideas, partnership opportunities
prompts.example_input: Analysis of Notion for a competing productivity tool
prompts.example_output: Detailed competitive intelligence with strategic opportunities identified
prompts.customize: Replace competitor name and focus on your specific business context

prompts.title: Webinar Funnel Designer
prompts.prompt: Design a webinar funnel for [TOPIC] targeting [AUDIENCE]. Create: 1) Registration page copy (headline + subheading), 2) Email sequence (3 pre-webinar), 3) Slide outline (5 main points), 4) Pitch strategy (last 5 minutes), 5) Follow-up sequence (3 emails).
prompts.use_case: Lead generation, product launches, course promotions, consulting sign-ups
prompts.example_input: Webinar 'The Ultimate Guide to Personal Branding' for mid-career professionals
prompts.example_output: Complete funnel blueprint from registration through conversion
prompts.customize: Update topic, audience, and business goal to match your webinar
